description: Sector overlay for South African upstream petroleum, petroleum products, pipelines, storage, licensing, HSE, environmental, and regulatory reporting documentation.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Oil and Gas. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African statutes, regulators, guidance, and sector sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Petroleum Products Act, 1977
primary_sources.issuer: Department of Mineral and Petroleum Resources

primary_sources.name: Upstream Petroleum Resources Development Act, 2024
primary_sources.issuer: Department of Mineral and Petroleum Resources

primary_sources.name: Petroleum Pipelines Act, 2003 and NERSA petroleum pipelines mandate
Mineral and Petroleum Resources Development Act, 2002

rules.title: Petroleum products licence or permit evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for petroleum manufacturing, wholesaling, retailing, site licence, or petroleum-product authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Upstream petroleum right or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for exploration, production, petroleum right, upstream petroleum approval, or DMPR authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Petroleum pipeline, storage, or loading-facility licence evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NERSA petroleum pipeline licence, storage licence, loading facility, tariff, or third-party access evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: HSE and emergency response evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for health, safety, environment, emergency response, spill, fire, or incident controls.

rules.title: Environmental management or decommissioning evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for environmental authorization, rehabilitation, decommissioning, waste, emissions, or pollution controls.
